title: General Medicine
description: Comprehensive care for all general health issues, fevers, and chronic diseases.

title: Maternity & Obstetrics
description: Complete care for expecting mothers, from prenatal checkups to safe delivery.

title: Gynecology
description: Expert treatment for women's health issues and reproductive health.

title: Pediatrics
description: Specialized care for infants, children, and adolescents.

title: Orthopedics
description: Treatment for bone, joint, and muscle disorders, including fractures.

title: ENT
description: Diagnosis and treatment of Ear, Nose, and Throat conditions.

title: Dermatology
description: Care for skin, hair, and nail diseases.

title: Emergency & Trauma
description: 24/7 emergency services for critical care and trauma cases.

title: Pathology & Diagnostics
description: Advanced lab services for accurate diagnosis.

title: ICU
description: Intensive Care Unit with advanced monitoring for critical patients.
